# Zhang et al. VO2 Public-Data Provenance

This directory contains provenance metadata for public external literature artifacts. It is not project-generated experimental data.

- Nature article: DOI 10.1038/s41467-024-51254-4.
- Zenodo record: DOI 10.5281/zenodo.13119587.
- Author code: GitHub tag v1.0.0.
- The 13 V member is repository-withheld before fit_lock.json; pre-lock processing records ZIP directory metadata only and does not decompress it.
- Source-paper model reproduction, repository refit, cross-voltage evaluation, and genuinely independent external validation are distinct evidence classes.
